title: TEDS Lite
description: The peformance version of TEDS Plus
body:
**NEW INSTALLER FOR VANILLA LAUNCHER: [github.com/TeamTEDS/teds-plus-installer](https://github.com/TeamTEDS/teds-plus-installer/releases/latest)**

TEDS Lite is a fantastic modpack for fps and additionally, fantastic support for mods. This modpack has it all. You will get fantastic performance from this group of mods. This modpack is also a fantastic template for any mods or modpacks.

This modpack is made to be easily accessible to new Minecraft modders who aren't big fans of the modded features, but enjoy performance. There also is very close Optifine feature imitation.

Enjoy the wonderful experience minecraft has to bring to you, but with mods that will help you out a lot.

This is the perfect modpack for anyone new to modding, or minecraft in general.

[TEDS Plus](https://modrinth.com/modpack/teds-plus)  

Do not repost this mod without credit / a link to this page. You can and are promoted to adapt and change this modpack, or even merge it with other modpacks, but please credit / have a link to this page!
\
If you want to make an official colab, like a special version, be sure to reach out with your version, and I would be happy to make it officially affiliated.
